title: Relative qui: the person who...
subtitle: Join two small sentences without making them heavy.
duolingoBridge: A2 needs longer but still clear sentences.
overview: Knowledge point 1: qui is the subject of the second idea.
Knowledge point 2: qui can refer to a person or a thing.

sections.title: Qui map
rows: It is Marie who is calling.
Je connais quelqu’un qui peut aider.
I know someone who can help.
Conozco a alguien que puede ayudar.

items.fr: J’ai un ami qui habite à Paris.
items.en: I have a friend who lives in Paris.
items.es: Tengo un amigo que vive en París.

items.fr: C’est la personne qui m’a aidé.
items.en: It is the person who helped me.
items.es: Es la persona que me ayudó.

items.fr: Je prends le bus qui va à la gare.
items.en: I take the bus that goes to the station.
items.es: Tomo el autobús que va a la estación.

items.fr: Elle cherche un livre qui est facile.
items.en: She is looking for a book that is easy.
items.es: Busca un libro que sea fácil.

items.fr: Je connais quelqu’un qui parle espagnol.
items.en: I know someone who speaks Spanish.
items.es: Conozco a alguien que habla español.
